creator: umq@ueo.co.jp
text:
The chief developer of mail/dkim-milter has moved to
	mail/opendkim two years ago.
	And there's no announcement nor sign of active development in
	dkim-milter upstream since then.

	There are numerous bugs in mail/dkim-milter, that have been
	fixed in mail/opendkim.
	I strongly recommend that users of mail/dkim-milter should
	move to mail/opendkim.

Fix: 

N/A
How-To-Repeat: 	N/A
